cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out the answer here. The question is asking which word best describes Pieter when he fought with the crocodile. The options are Clear-headed, Frightened, Regretful, or Thoughtful. First, let me read through the passage again to pick up the key details. So, Pieter was taking his horse for a swim in a farm dam. He was aware of hippos and didn't see any, but he forgot about the crocodiles. Then he got bitten on the hip, realized it was a crocodile, and started to fight immediately. He hit the crocodile with his left arm, and then the crocodile took part of his left arm off. He mentions that he didn't realize the crocodile had taken part of his arm off until later.
